title: SoSimple opimize
description: Boost your graphics and fps with this simple modpack. Support all new version !
body:
# 🍵Tea
#### If you like my modpack you can [buy me a tea](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/feilka46). Also you can join to our [Discord server]()
# **📥 Installation Guide**
#### Download [MultiMC](https://multimc.org/) or [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app)
Drag file what you downloaded in window of launcher and you installed the pack.
# 📈 Benchmarks
 - Intel i3-12100F | Intel UHD Graphics 730 (before 68 fps, after 230) [3.3x faster]
 - Intel i3-6100U | NVIDIA GeForce GT 920MX (before 47 fps, after 156 fps) [3.3x faster]
 - Intel i3-540 | NVIDIA GeForce GT 710 (before 24 fps, after 87 fps) [4.8x faster]
 - Intel i7-5500U | NVIDIA GeForce GT 840M (before 67 fps, after 287) [4.2x faster]
 - AMD Ryzen 5 5500U | AMD Radeon RX Vega 7 (before 45 fps, after 131) [2.9x faster]
 - Intel i7-6700HQ | NVIDIA GeForce GTX 965M (before 110 fps, after 120) [1.09x faster]
 
 All test was on 1.20.1
